payload.summary: Accepted the bounded invocation-receipt packet. A Codex gpt-5.3-codex-spark coordinator transported the paid DeepSeek V4 Pro-authored response and is responsible only for applying that response mechanically and running the authorized verification commands.
claims: The secure DeepSeek adapter exited with status 0.
The implementation author is DeepSeek V4 Pro; the Codex coordinator does not replace its design reasoning.
requests: Have the GPT sensor independently inspect the resulting diff and allocate the next mailbox sequence.
